description: Canonical 15-control benchmark used by validate_mappings.py. Each entry pairs a synthetic scanner finding with the single compliance control it must map to. Controls use disjoint keywords/scanner_signals so the deterministic candidate narrowing selects exactly the intended control as its top candidate. The validation script ingests these findings through the real pipeline (with the AI mapping mocked to accept the top candidate) and compares predicted control ids against the gold expectations, reporting precision/recall.

controls.title: Access control
controls.description: Rules to control access to information and other associated assets.
controls.objective: Limit access to information and systems based on business and security requirements.

controls.title: Encryption of information
controls.description: Protection of the confidentiality, authenticity and/or integrity of information.
controls.objective: Ensure safe use of cryptography to protect the confidentiality of information.

controls.title: Key management
controls.description: Policies and procedures for the management of cryptographic keys.
controls.objective: Ensure proper management of keys through their life cycle.

controls.title: Logging and monitoring
controls.description: Activity logging and continuous monitoring of anomalous behaviour.
controls.objective: Record events and generate evidence for the detection of anomalous activities.

controls.title: Network controls
controls.description: Networks and network services are securely managed.
controls.objective: Protect information in networks and protect the supporting infrastructure.

controls.title: Information backup
controls.description: Procedures for backup and recovery of information.
controls.objective: Maintain the continuity of operations during incidents.

controls.title: Access rights
controls.description: Provisioning and review of access rights for all users.
controls.objective: Prevent privilege escalation and unauthorized use of privileged functions.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.description: Technical vulnerabilities are identified and remediated in due time.

controls.title: Authentication
controls.description: Processes for verifying identity of users and entities.
controls.objective: Ensure users and services are authenticated appropriately.

controls.title: Configuration management
controls.description: Hardware, software, services and networks are hardened.
controls.objective: Establish secure configuration baselines and detect drift.

controls.title: Network segmentation
controls.description: Networks are segmented according to the access control policy.
controls.objective: Limit the impact of a security incident through separation of environments.

controls.title: Physical security perimeters
controls.description: Physical barriers protect areas containing information and assets.
controls.objective: Prevent unauthorized physical access to facilities and equipment.

controls.title: Incident management planning
controls.description: Procedures for responding to and managing information security incidents.
controls.objective: Ensure a consistent and effective approach to incident handling.

controls.title: Protection of records
controls.description: Records are protected from loss, destruction or falsification.
controls.objective: Comply with statutory, regulatory and contractual obligations.

controls.title: Supplier assessment
controls.description: Risks from the use of products and services supplied externally.
controls.objective: Ensure risks from supplier relationships are identified and managed.
